w:r.w:t: Week 1 OVLP Grade Pre-Nursery IT Term 3.mp4
Draw a picture with letter “q”. (quill, queen)
Draw a picture with letter “q” (quill, queen)
Pupils will learn about food of the week is Papaya
Write the first letter of pictures (moon, orange, pear, queen).
Match the letter with pictures (juice, lamp, kite, and quilt)
What is the National game of Pakistan? Ans:
Hockey is the national game of Pakistan.
Tell the names of 5 pet animals.
Dog, Cat, Parrot, Fish and Rabbit.
Where do Muslims go for Prayers? Ans:
Muslims go to Masjid for Prayers.
work done this week is complete.
